site.title: partifinansiering.se
seo.homeMetaDescription: Explore how Sweden’s Riksdag parties are financed: revenue sources, major donations, and local organisations from Kammarkollegiet’s Partiinsyn.
seo.partyMetaDescription: Revenue, breakdown, local organisations, and trends for {party} — based on official Partiinsyn data.
chart.title: Revenue sources by party
chart.description: Distribution of total revenue based on Kammarkollegiet's reporting
partyOverview.title: Party overview
footer.tagline: An independent review of how political parties are financed. Based on official data from Kammarkollegiet's Partiinsyn.
footer.budgetLink: See party budget proposals at statsbudget.se
footer.disclaimer: This site is provided as-is and accepts no responsibility for the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of the information shown. Official figures from Kammarkollegiet prevail.
party.revenueOverTimeDescription: Total revenue by fiscal year, split by income source as grouped in Kammarkollegiet’s reporting.
party.revenuePerVoteHint: Total revenue for {year} divided by valid Riksdag votes in the 2022 election ({source}).
party.orgEmpty: No data for the selected year.
topDonors.title: Top 10 donors {year}
topDonors.intro: The overview shows larger single donations from private persons or enterprises.
topDonors.note: If donations were made to several parties or party units, the same person or enterprise may appear more than once.
topDonors.empty: No large donations in this category for the selected year.
